failure_evidence.finding: student created and verified a correct-looking workbook, but env returned only scalar 0.0
after EvaluationResult telemetry, hosted grader reported ModuleNotFoundError("No module named 'deliverable_io'")

proposed_change.summary: Preserve grader diagnostics in HUD v6 traces and make synced grader_source imports robust in hosted execution.
changes: env._to_eval returns EvaluationResult with content, info, and subscores instead of a bare float
env._load_grader adds APP_ROOT and task_dir to sys.path before executing grader_source
env._load_grader preloads deliverable_io and native_grading from APP_ROOT
deliverable_io.read_xlsx closes openpyxl workbooks after reading
native_grading awaits combine(...) and falls back to deterministic-only scores when LLMJudgeGrader errors

promotion_rule.reason: This restores grader observability and nonzero deterministic rewards without weakening the task or changing hidden answers.
